title: Homelands
description: Homelands is a cozy, atmospheric Fabric 1.20.1 modpack blending Create tech, farming, cooking, and detailed decoration. Build peaceful villages, craft gourmet meals, and explore a vibrant world enhanced by immersive visuals, sounds, and performance mods.
body:
# Homelands
**An Atmospheric Create & Life Simulation Modpack for Fabric 1.20.1**

**Homelands** is an immersive, detail-rich modpack that focuses on **atmosphere, craftsmanship, creativity, and slow living**.  
Experience a peaceful, vibrant Minecraft world where technology, nature, and aesthetics blend seamlessly together.

---

## 🌾 Features

### 🍞 Life & Farming
Dive into a lovingly expanded food and farming system:
- **Farmer’s Delight**, **Expanded Delight**, **More Delight**, **Rustic Delight**, **Vegan Delight**, **Festive Delight**, **Oceans Delight**, and more  
  → New dishes, cooking tools, and recipes  
- **Let’s Do** series (*Bakery*, *Meadow*, *Vinery*, *Farm & Charm*, *Furniture*, *Nethervinery*, *Wilder Nature*, *Herbal Brews*)  
  → Handcrafted farmhouses, cozy villages, and picturesque landscapes  
- **Diet Mod** – Eat consciously and stay healthy!  

---

### ⚙️ Technology & Progress
Build impressive machines and workshops:
- **Create**, **Create Deco**, **Create Unlimited**, **Steam Rails**  
  → Mechanical marvels, moving trains, and automated factories  
- **Supplementaries** & **Storage Drawers**  
  → Smart storage and handy gadgets for your base  

---

### 🏠 Decoration & Architecture
Design unique homes and settlements:
- **Beautify**, **Handcrafted**, **Decorative Blocks**, **Dusty Deco**, **Copycats**  
- **Macaw’s Mods** (*Roofs*, *Windows*, *Bridges*, *Fences*, *Stairs*, *Paths*)  
- **Diagonal Walls/Fences**, **Sawmill**, **Visual Workbench**, **Cosmetic Armor**  

Build with beauty and detail – every home tells its own story.

---

### 🌍 World & Exploration
The world of Homelands is wild yet welcoming:
- **YUNG’s Better Structures** (Dungeons, Strongholds, Mineshafts, etc.)  
- **Incendium** – a reimagined Nether experience  
- **Immersive Weathering**, **Wilder Nature**  
- **Nifty Carts**, **Eureka! Ships!**, **Traveler’s Backpack** – explore with style  

---

### 🌄 Atmosphere & Immersion
Special attention is given to ambiance and mood:
- **Distant Horizons**, **Iris + Sodium**, **Entity Features**, **Continuity**  
  → Vast vistas, soft lighting, smooth performance  
- **Ambient Sounds**, **Presence Footsteps**, **Sound Physics**, **Cool Rain**, **Immersive Thunder**  
  → A living soundscape and dynamic weather effects  
- **Blur**, **Camera Overhaul**, **Eating Animation**, **Spawn Animations**, **Visuality**, **Subtle Effects**  
  → Small details, big impact  

---

### ⚙️ Performance & Quality
Despite its depth, Homelands runs butter-smooth thanks to:
- **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **C2ME**, **ModernFix**, **ImmediatelyFast**, **Entity Culling**  
- **Dynamic FPS**, **Clumps**, **Noisium** – optimized frames and reduced latency  

---

### 🧰 Comfort & UI
Small helpers that make a big difference:
- **AppleSkin**, **Jade + Addons**, **BetterF3**, **RightClickHarvest**, **MouseTweaks**, **Mouse Wheelie**, **Nature’s Compass**, **Voice Chat**  
- **Fancymenu**, **ModMenu**, **Reese’s Sodium Options** – for a modern interface  

---

## 🧭 Goal of the Pack
**Homelands** is designed for players who:
- seek a **calm, immersive gameplay experience**,  
- appreciate **decoration, roleplay, technology, and atmosphere** equally,  
- and want to experience **Minecraft as a living world** – with depth and soul.  

Whether you’re building a secluded mountain village, creating massive machines with Create, or simply enjoying the sunsets over the meadows — **Homelands** gives you the perfect setting.

---

## 💡 Technical Info
- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1  
- **Modloader:** Fabric  
- **Recommended Mods:** Iris + Sodium (shader compatible)  
- **Recommended RAM:** 6–8 GB  

---

## ❤️ Credits
A huge thank-you to all mod developers whose work makes this experience possible.  
This modpack curates their creations with the goal of crafting a harmonious, atmospheric Minecraft world.

The following resource packs and mods are not from Modrinth, but are given extra credit here:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
Stay True: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
Extended Bogeys (Borked): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-extended-bogeys-borked-addon

---

*Find your place. Build your home. Welcome to the **Homelands.*** 🕊️
